title: Config Sync groups file
description: Defines which config groups obsidian-config-sync publishes/applies. Lives at <data folder>/config-sync.json inside the vault.

path.description: Vault-relative path; {configDir} expands to this device's config dir

description.description: Human-readable label for this group, shown in the settings panel

mode.description: Sync mode. Absent = "plain". "fields" (file groups only) applies per-field rules; "encrypted" encrypts the whole file.

locked.description: Preset rule injected by the plugin; cannot be removed in the UI.

label.description: Display name recorded when the item is enabled or captured; shown even where the plugin isn't installed.

origin.description: Set by the plugin for rules created from the Discovered-files section; name and path are fixed by the file.
